2604.12184.title: TRUST Agents: A Collaborative Multi-Agent Framework for Fake News Detection, Explainable Verification, and Logic-Aware Claim Reasoning
2604.12184.paper_summary: TRUST Agents is a collaborative multi-agent framework for explainable fact verification and fake news detection. Rather than treating verification as a simple true-or-false classification task, the system identifies verifiable claims, retrieves relevant evidence, compares claims against that evidence, reasons under uncertainty, and generates explanations that humans can inspect. The baseline pipeline consists of four specialized agents. A claim extractor uses named entity recognition, dependency parsing, and LLM-based extraction to identify factual claims. A retrieval agent performs hybrid sparse and dense search using BM25 and FAISS. A verifier agent compares claims with retrieved evidence and produces verdicts with calibrated confidence. An explainer agent then generates a human-readable report with explicit evidence citations. To handle complex claims more effectively, we introduce a research-oriented extension with three additional components: a decomposer agent inspired by LoCal-style claim decomposition, a Delphi-inspired multi-agent jury with specialized verifier personas, and a logic aggregator that combines atomic verdicts using conjunction, disjunction, negation, and implication. We evaluate both pipelines on the LIAR benchmark against fine-tuned BERT, fine-tuned RoBERTa, and a zero-shot LLM baseline. Although supervised encoders remain stronger on raw metrics, TRUST Agents improves interpretability, evidence transparency, and reasoning over compound claims. Results also show that retrieval quality and uncertainty calibration remain the main bottlenecks in trustworthy automated fact verification.
2604.12184.paper_summary_zh: TRUST Agents 是一個協作的多智能體框架，用於可解釋的事實驗證和假新聞檢測。<lb/>該系統不僅僅將驗證視為簡單的真或假分類任務，而是識別可驗證的主張，檢索相關證據，將主張與該證據進行比較，在不確定性下進行推理，並生成人類可以檢查的解釋。<lb/>基線管道由四個專門的智能體組成。<lb/>主張提取器使用命名實體識別、依賴解析和基於 LLM 的提取來識別事實主張。<lb/>檢索智能體使用 BM25 和 FAISS 執行混合稀疏和密集搜索。<lb/>驗證智能體將主張與檢索到的證據進行比較，並以校準的信心產生裁決。<lb/>然後，解釋智能體生成一份可供人類閱讀的報告，並明確引用證據。<lb/>為了更有效地處理複雜主張，我們引入了一個以研究為導向的擴展，包含三個額外組件：一個受 LoCal 風格主張分解啟發的分解智能體、一個受 Delphi 啟發的多智能體陪審團，擁有專門的驗證者角色，以及一個使用合取、析取、否定和蘊涵來組合原子裁決的邏輯聚合器。<lb/>我們在 LIAR 基準上對這兩個管道進行評估，並與微調過的 BERT、微調過的 RoBERTa 和零樣本 LLM 基線進行比較。<lb/>儘管監督編碼器在原始指標上仍然更強，但 TRUST Agents 改善了可解釋性、證據透明度和對複合主張的推理。<lb/>結果還顯示，檢索質量和不確定性校準仍然是可信自動事實驗證的主要瓶頸。
2604.12184.author: Gautama Shastry Bulusu Venkata et.al.
2604.12184.authors: Gautama Shastry Bulusu Venkata, Santhosh Kakarla, Maheedhar Omtri Mohan, Aishwarya Gaddam
